zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunel於1245年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦福林時，他的父親Robert II de Wavrin32歲，母親Mathilde De Bethune28歲。他和Marie de ROYE至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1301年享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunel于1245年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦福林时，他的父亲Robert II de Wavrin32岁，母亲Mathilde De Bethune28岁。他和Marie de ROYE至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1301年享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: WAVRIN
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: SAINT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: VENANT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish, English:  see  Tennant  .

variants.name: Tennant
meanings: Scottish and English: status name for a farmer who held his land from an overlord by obligations of rent or service, from Middle English tena(u)nt ‘tenant’ (Old French tenant). This was the normal situation for landholders in the Middle Ages, since in the feudal system all land belonged ultimately to the king and use of it was granted in return for financial or military support.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunel was born in 1245, in Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Robert II de Wavrin, was 32 and his mother, Mathilde De Bethune, was 28. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Marie de ROYE. He died in 1301, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunel est né en 1245, à Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Robert II de Wavrin, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mathilde De Bethune, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Marie de ROYE. Il est décédé en 1301, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunel 1245 in Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert II de Wavrin 32 und seine Mutter Mathilde De Bethune 28. Er hatte mit Marie de ROYE mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1301 im Alter von 56 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunel è nato il nel 1245 nel Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Robert II de Wavrin, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde De Bethune, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Marie de ROYE. Morì nel 1301, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunelが1245年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードワvリンで生まれた時，父Robert II de Wavrinは32歳，母Mathilde De Bethuneは28歳であった。彼はMarie de ROYEとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1301年に56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunel(이)가 1245년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 와브린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert II de Wavrin(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde De Bethune(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Marie de ROYE(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1301년 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunel nasceu em 1245, em Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Robert II de Wavrin, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde De Bethune, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Marie de ROYE. Ele faleceu em 1301, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunel родился в 1245 г. в местности ваврин, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert II de Wavrin было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde De Bethune, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Marie de ROYE. Он умер в 1301 г. в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert DE WAVRIN DE SAINT VENANT III Brunel nació en 1245, en Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Robert II de Wavrin, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mathilde De Bethune, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Marie de ROYE. Murió en 1301, a la edad de 56 años.
